negative_prompt: The video captures a series of frames showing ugly scenes, static with no motion, motion blur, over-saturation, shaky footage, low resolution, grainy texture, pixelated images, poorly lit areas, underexposed and overexposed scenes, poor color balance, washed out colors, choppy sequences, jerky movements, low frame rate, artifacting, color banding, unnatural transitions, outdated special effects, fake elements, unconvincing visuals, poorly edited content, jump cuts, visual noise, and flickering. Overall, the video is of poor quality.
name: human_117
prompt: The video opens with a wide aerial shot of an expansive ocean under a cloudy sky, creating a serene yet dynamic backdrop. The water is a deep, vibrant blue, with gentle waves rolling towards the shore. In the distance, three surfers are visible; one closer to the foreground and two further out, all waiting for the right wave. The closer surfer, wearing a dark wetsuit, is positioned on a surfboard, poised to catch an approaching wave. The wave itself is a striking shade of turquoise, breaking with white foam at its crest, suggesting it's a powerful but manageable size for surfing. As the video progresses, the closer surfer begins to paddle forward, gaining momentum as they approach the breaking wave. The wave rises steadily, curling over with increasing force. The surfer maintains balance, shifting their weight and adjusting their stance to ride the wave smoothly. The wave crests, and the surfer continues to maneuver skillfully along the face of the wave, showcasing their expertise and control. The other two surfers remain in the background, observing the action, while the ocean's vastness and the cloudy sky provide a dramatic setting for this surfing sequence. By the end of the video, the surfer is riding the wave with confidence, demonstrating a seamless blend of skill and harmony with the ocean's power.
